TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Eddie_Basden, title = Eddie_Basden, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Eddie_Basden} }

S.FORM: Eddie Basden sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 2, Eddie Basden, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Eddie Basden sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 2, Eddie Basden, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: e**ie βas~ɕ*en s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, e**ie βas~ɕ*en, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
